LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Banana_Yucca.description: A hardy desert plant found throughout the Mojave, banana yucca produces sweet, starchy fruit that is a staple for survival. Its thick leaves and resilience make it a reliable source of nutrition for wasteland wanderers.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Banana_Yucca.label: Banana Yucca
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Barrel_Cactus.description: This round, spiny cactus stores water in its thick stem and can be found scattered across arid landscapes. Barrel cactus fruit is edible and provides a modest but vital source of hydration and nutrition in the harsh wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Barrel_Cactus.label: Barrel Cactus
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Broc_Flower.description: A rare desert flower prized for its medicinal properties. Broc flower is a key ingredient in healing powders and is sought after by wasteland survivors for its restorative effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Broc_Flower.label: Broc Flower
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Buffalo_Gourd.description: A tough, wild gourd found in arid regions. While not especially tasty, its seeds and flesh can be eaten in a pinch, and it is sometimes used in traditional recipes by wastelanders.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Buffalo_Gourd.label: Buffalo Gourd
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot.description: A nutritious root vegetable cultivated by survivors for its sweet flavor and versatility. Carrots are a staple crop in many wasteland settlements.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot.label: Carrot
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot_Flower.description: The delicate flower of the carrot plant, sometimes found growing wild. Its seeds are used for propagation and can be a rare treat for foragers.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot_Flower.label: Carrot Flower
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Cranberry.description: A tart, red berry cultivated in wasteland farms for its nutritional value and use in preserves. Cranberries are a resilient crop, thriving in moist soil.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Cranberry.label: Cranberry
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Glowing_Mushroom.description: A mutated fungus that emits a faint, eerie glow. Glowing mushrooms are found in irradiated caves and are sometimes used in wasteland remedies, though they may be mildly radioactive.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Glowing_Mushroom.label: Glowing Mushroom
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Gourd.description: A versatile vegetable grown for its edible flesh and use as a container. Gourds are a common sight in wasteland gardens and provide a reliable food source.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Gourd.label: Gourd
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Honey_Mesquite.description: A hardy desert shrub with sweet pods. Honey mesquite is used by wastelanders for food, fuel, and even medicine, making it a valuable resource in arid regions.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Honey_Mesquite.label: Honey Mesquite
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Jalapeno.description: A spicy pepper grown in wasteland gardens, jalapenos add heat and flavor to many survivor recipes. Hardy and productive, they are a favorite among cultivators.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Jalapeno.label: Jalapeno
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Maize.description: A staple crop in the wasteland, maize is grown for its hearty ears and versatility. It is a key ingredient in many survivor meals and can be stored for long periods.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Maize.label: Maize
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Melon.description: A sweet, juicy fruit grown in wasteland gardens. Melons are prized for their refreshing taste and high water content, making them a valuable crop in arid regions.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Melon.label: Melon
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutated_Fern.description: A strange, mutated fern found in irradiated areas. Its fronds are tough and sometimes used in makeshift remedies, though caution is advised due to possible contamination.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutated_Fern.label: Mutated Fern
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutfruit.description: A genetically modified fruit, mutfruit is a staple crop in the Fallout universe. Its sweet, tangy flavor and high yield make it a favorite among wasteland farmers.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutfruit.label: Mutfruit
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Nevada_Agave.description: A resilient desert succulent, Nevada agave is harvested for its sweet sap and fibrous leaves. Wastelanders use it for food, drink, and crafting.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Nevada_Agave.label: Nevada Agave
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Prickly_Pear_Cactus.descriptio: A spiny cactus found in the Mojave, prized for its edible pads and sweet fruit. Prickly pear is a vital source of hydration and nutrition for desert dwellers.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Prickly_Pear_Cactus.label: Prickly Pear Cactus
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Razorgrain.description: A hardy, mutated grain crop grown for its tough stalks and nutritious seeds. Razorgrain is a staple in many wasteland settlements, used for bread and porridge.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Razorgrain.label: Razorgrain
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Siltbean.description: A protein-rich bean crop, siltbeans are grown in the wasteland for their nutritional value and ability to thrive in poor soil. They are a key ingredient in many survivor meals.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Siltbean.label: Siltbean
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tarberry.description: A mutated berry found in marshy areas, tarberries are prized for their sweet flavor and mild radioactivity. Used in unique wasteland recipes and sometimes for trade.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tarberry.label: Tarberry
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tato.description: A hybrid of tomato and potato, the tato is a staple crop in the Fallout universe. Its hearty tubers and tangy fruit are a reliable food source for survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tato.label: Tato
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Xander_Root.description: A gnarled desert root with potent medicinal properties. Xander root is a key ingredient in healing powders and is highly valued by wasteland healers.
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Xander_Root.label: Xander Root
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Broc_Flower.description: Medicinal flower harvested from broc flower plants. Used in healing powders.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Broc_Flower.label: broc flower
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Buffalo_Gourd.description: Seeds and flesh harvested from buffalo gourd plants. Edible in a pinch.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Buffalo_Gourd.label: buffalo gourd
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot.description: A sweet, nutritious root vegetable harvested from carrot plants. A staple food in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot.label: carrot
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot_Flower.description: Delicate flower harvested from wild carrot plants. Used for propagation and as a rare treat.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot_Flower.label: carrot flower
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Cranberry.description: A tart, red berry harvested from cranberry plants. Used in preserves and survivor meals.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Cranberry.label: cranberry
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Banana_Yucca.description: Sweet, starchy fruit harvested from banana yucca plants. A staple for survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Banana_Yucca.label: banana yucca fruit
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Barrel_Cactus.description: Edible fruit harvested from barrel cactus. Provides hydration and nutrition.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Barrel_Cactus.label: barrel cactus fruit
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Glowing_Mushroom.description: Mutated fungus harvested from glowing mushroom plants. Emits a faint glow and may be mildly radioactive.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Glowing_Mushroom.label: glowing mushroom
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Gourd.description: A versatile vegetable harvested from gourd plants. Edible and useful as a container.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Gourd.label: gourd
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Honey_Mesquite.description: Sweet pods harvested from honey mesquite shrubs. Used for food, fuel, and medicine.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Honey_Mesquite.label: honey mesquite pod
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Jalapeno.description: A spicy pepper harvested from jalapeno plants. Adds heat to wasteland recipes.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Jalapeno.label: jalapeno
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Maize.description: Hearty ears of maize harvested from maize plants. A key ingredient in survivor meals.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Maize.label: maize
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Melon.description: A sweet, juicy fruit harvested from melon plants. Prized for its refreshing taste.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Melon.label: melon
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutated_Fern.description: Tough fronds harvested from mutated fern plants. Sometimes used in makeshift remedies.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutated_Fern.label: mutated fern frond
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutfruit.description: A genetically modified fruit harvested from mutfruit trees. Sweet and tangy.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutfruit.label: mutfruit
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Nevada_Agave.description: Sweet sap and fibrous leaves harvested from Nevada agave. Used for food, drink, and crafting.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Nevada_Agave.label: nevada agave
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Prickly_Pear.description: Edible pads and sweet fruit harvested from prickly pear cactus. Vital for desert dwellers.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Prickly_Pear.label: prickly pear
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Razorgrain.description: Tough stalks and nutritious seeds harvested from razorgrain plants. Used for bread and porridge.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Razorgrain.label: razorgrain
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Siltbean.description: Protein-rich beans harvested from siltbean plants. Thrives in poor soil.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Siltbean.label: siltbean
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tarberry.description: Mutated berry harvested from tarberry plants. Sweet and mildly radioactive.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tarberry.label: tarberry
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tato.description: A hybrid tuber harvested from tato plants. Hearty and tangy.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tato.label: tato
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Xander_Root.description: Gnarled root harvested from xander root plants. Highly valued for its medicinal properties.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Xander_Root.label: xander root
